# zstack_role (Resource)

Manages a Role in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the role

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the role
- `identity` (String) The identity of the role

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the role
- `type` (String) The type of the role
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the role
